Create a list of PRISM association table

Source: R/helpers-prism-plotlist.R
create_PRISM_summary_list.Rd

Create a list of PRISM association table

Usage

create_PRISM_summary_list(assoc_summary_RV, assoc_summary_GR = NULL)

Arguments

assoc_summary_RV

A data.table with associations for normalization type of "Relative Viability", outputted by gDRplots::prep_assoc_summary()

assoc_summary_GR

A data.table with associations for normalization type of "GR Value", outputted by gDRplots::prep_assoc_summary()

Value

A list of table split by drug name and normalization type

Author

Janina Smoła janina.smola@contractors.roche.com

On this page

Developed by Marc Hafner, Janina Smola, Bartosz Czech, Dariusz Scigocki, Arkadiusz Gladki.
